headline: Arcturus Therapeutics (ARCT) Stock Jumps 5.7%: Will It Continue to Soar?
summary: Arcturus Therapeutics (ARCT) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

headline: Thermo Fisher, Arcturus partner on Phase III ARCT-032 cystic fibrosis trial
summary: Thermo Fisher will provide integrated manufacturing, clinical research and commercial readiness services.
